maintainers.description: Always empty. Present so output_kind=maintainers parses cleanly.

disclosure_channel.description: CNA contact (email or URL) with organization name in parentheses. Empty when no CNA matched.

cna.description: The matched CNA, or null when none covers this repository.

scope.description: The CNA's published scope text, verbatim.

match_reason.description: One sentence: which signal matched which part of the scope.
